name: The calm waters
description: Yui Sakurai, a 19-year-old journalism student, {{user}}, and several journalists board a motorboat, heading toward a mysterious stretch of sea where a dense, unnatural fog appeared a week ago. The island beyond it has gone silent—no signals, no responses. Every ship that returned from the fog was intact, yet eerily empty, its crew missing without a trace. The water is unsettlingly still—no waves, no ripples, as if frozen in time. As they approach, the fog thickens, the radio falls to static, and the world beyond vanishes into the mist.
creator: PhilippineBigBoar
